hero.title: What can I help you ship today?
hero.subtitle: Ask anything across your meetings, files, and decisions — and I'll show you exactly where the answer came from.

input.hint: Enter to send · Shift + Enter for a new line

summarize.title: Summarize my last meeting
summarize.subtitle: Decisions, owners, and next steps
summarize.prompt: Summarize my last meeting and list every decision with its owner.

extractTasks.title: Extract action items
extractTasks.subtitle: From yesterday's standup
extractTasks.prompt: Extract every action item from yesterday's standup with deadlines and owners.

findDecisions.title: Find a past decision
findDecisions.subtitle: What did we agree on?
findDecisions.prompt: What did we decide about pricing in last week's planning?

draftEmail.title: Draft a follow-up
draftEmail.subtitle: Email to the design team
draftEmail.prompt: Draft a follow-up email to the design team with the action items from today's review.
